settings.title: A Gift for You
settings.text:
Enjoy a Complimentary Bracelet with
Your Order Over $500

Offer ends April 30th

As a token of appreciation, we're gifting you a Lash Single Wrap Bracelet with every order over $500/€500/£500.
This signature piece will be automatically added to your shipment - no action needed.

Crafted with the same bold elegance that defines our collections, the Lash Single Wrap Bracelet is a timeless addition to your jewelry collection.
